applyTo: "**/*.py"

<!-- generated by velocai projection from docs/adrs/ — do not edit; edit the source ADR and run `just project` -->

# python-style rules

Rules below are projected from ADRs. Before modifying in-scope files, read the cited ADR in `docs/adrs/`; do not re-litigate accepted decisions.

- All Python functions, methods (including private/underscore-prefixed), classes, and modules require Google-style docstrings stating intent and contract, not signature restatement. Pydantic model fields require Field(description=...). (ADR-0001)
